text.title: Accessibility Basics Worked Example
text.summary: One full end-to-end worked example demonstrating a typical report produced by this methodology.

section.title: Example trace
section.p: A typical 5-minute quick-check on a small signup page produces 3 findings tagged with POUR + WCAG SC.

example.title: Quick-check on /signup
example.code: Scope: https://example.com/signup, WCAG 2.2 AA, owner @ruslan. Scanner findings (axe): - SC 1.4.3 [Perceivable, high]: Hero subtitle contrast 3.1:1. - SC 1.3.1 [Perceivable, medium]: Submit button placeholder-only label. Manual findings: - Tab pass: focus trapped inside cookie banner. Coverage statement: scanner catches ≈30%; manual + AT + user-testing required for full coverage. Verdict: partial.
example.note: Each finding carries SC number, POUR principle, severity, and source (scanner / manual).
